data.title: Consistency
data.description: Consistent design patterns across the platform to enhance user familiarity.
data.technical_spec: Unified design language across web and mobile apps.

data.title: Feedback
data.description: Immediate feedback for user actions to improve interaction.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements like loading spinners and progress indicators.

data.title: Accessibility
data.description: Efforts to make the website accessible to users with disabilities.
data.technical_spec: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across major sections.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimized placement of interactive elements to reduce user effort.
data.technical_spec: Call-to-action buttons placed intuitively within clickable distance.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reducing choice overload for quicker decision making.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation with categorized drop-down menus.
